title: Customer Persona Builder
promptText: You are a user research expert. Build a detailed customer persona for [PRODUCT_NAME], a [PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION] targeting [MARKET_SEGMENT]. Create a complete persona profile including: a realistic name and photo description, demographic details (age, location, income, education, family status), psychographic profile (values, interests, media consumption habits), professional background and daily routine, goals and motivations related to the problem your product solves, frustrations and pain points with current solutions, buying behavior and decision-making process, preferred communication channels, three direct quotes this persona would say about their problem, and objections they would have before purchasing. Also map this persona's customer journey from awareness to purchase to advocacy.
description: Customer personas transform abstract market segments into concrete individuals that product, marketing, and sales teams can build empathy for. This prompt goes beyond basic demographics to create psychographic profiles that reveal how and why customers make decisions. The inclusion of direct quotes gives copywriters authentic voice references, while the buying behavior section helps sales teams anticipate the purchase process. The customer journey map connects the persona to your actual funnel stages. Essential for product launches, marketing strategy development, or aligning cross-functional teams around a shared understanding of the customer.

variables.name: PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION
variables.example: personal finance app that uses AI to categorize expenses and suggest savings opportunities

variables.name: MARKET_SEGMENT
variables.example: young professionals aged 25-35 who earn good salaries but struggle to save

tips: Create 3-4 personas to cover your key segments using this prompt multiple times
Validate persona assumptions with real customer interview data
Pin the persona to your team's shared workspace for ongoing reference
exampleOutput:
## Persona: Sarah Chen, 28
**Photo Description:** Asian-American woman in business casual, holding a coffee, looking at her phone in a co-working space
**Location:** Austin, TX | **Income:** $82,000/year | **Education:** BS in Marketing
**Status:** Single, rents a 1-bedroom apartment, has a rescue dog named Pixel

**Psychographic Profile:**
Values experiences over material goods. Active on Instagram and TikTok. Listens to finance podcasts during her commute but feels overwhelmed by contradictory advice. Aspires to financial independence but associates budgeting with restriction and deprivation.

**Quote 1:** 'I make decent money but somehow I am always surprised when I check my bank account at the end of the month.'
**Quote 2:** 'I have downloaded three budgeting apps and abandoned all of them within a week because they made me feel guilty.'
metaTitle: Customer Persona Builder Prompt for Gemini
metaDescription: Create detailed customer personas with psychographics and journey maps. Try this free Gemini prompt for data-driven marketing strategies.
